privacy_policy_body: We respect your privacy. This app uses your account details, orders, favorites, cart, and local preferences only to provide the shopping experience. Profile images selected from your device stay local in this demo and are not uploaded to a server.
terms_body: By using this app, you agree to provide accurate account information, use the store for lawful purchases, and review order details before checkout. Product data, profile edits, and selected profile photos in this demo are stored locally for testing the app experience.
about_us_body: onpoint-store is a simple e-commerce experience for browsing products, managing favorites, updating a profile, and preparing orders from one clean mobile interface.
contact_us_body: For support, questions, or order assistance, contact the store team by email at support@onpoint-store.com.
